backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining a Clip type and implementing CRUD operations (saveClip, getAllClips, deleteClip, getClipById) for managing video clips with timestamps stored in a Map.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implemented features including YouTube URL form, embedded player, clip selection controls, clip list display, and deletion functionality with associated files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files describing components, hooks, and styling for the YouTube video clipper application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color system defining design tokens for light and dark themes including primary, secondary, muted, destructive, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React application with viewport meta tag and root div mounting point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React component managing video state, clip selection, and coordinating VideoUrlForm, YouTubePlayer, ClipTimestampControls, and ClipList with QueryClient and ThemeProvider setup.
frontend/src/components/ClipCard.tsx: Card component displaying individual clip with thumbnail, title, duration, time range, and delete button with confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/ClipList.tsx: Scrollable list component displaying all saved clips with loading states, empty state messaging, and handling clip selection and deletion.
frontend/src/components/ClipTimestampCon: Form component for creating clips with title input, start/end timestamp controls, validation, and save functionality that calls the backend API.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component with header (ClipTube branding with YouTube and scissors icons), footer (with caffeine.ai attribution link), and a main content area wrapper.
frontend/src/components/VideoUrlForm.tsx: Form component for entering and validating YouTube URLs, displays error messages and triggers onSubmit callback with validated URL and extracted video ID.
frontend/src/components/YouTubePlayer.ts: Embeds a YouTube video player iframe in a responsive 16:9 aspect ratio card using the provided video ID.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages an ICP backend actor, switching between authenticated and anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and invalidating dependent queries on actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipCreation.ts: React Query mutation hook for creating video clips via the backend actor, accepts title, URLs, and timestamps, and invalidates the clips query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useClips.ts: React Query hook for fetching all clips and deleting clips via the backend actor, tracks deletion state and invalidates queries on mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipTimestamps.ts: Manages start/end timestamp state (minutes and seconds), provides validation, formatting, and conversion utilities for clip time ranges.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, manages AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout flows, identity state, and login status tracking.
Utility hook providing functions to validate YouTube URLs and extract 11-character video IDs from youtube.com or youtu.be links.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark theme colors using OKLCH color space, including primary, secondary, accent, and chart colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the App component into the root DOM element.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending the theme with custom OKLCH colors, container settings, border radius variables, Inter font, and animation keyframes for accordions.
project_state.json: Project state file for a YouTube video clipping application tracking 6 existing features (URL input, video player, clip selection, clip list, delete, and visual theme) and 2 pending feature requests for clip metadata storage.
